CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Transport
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Act as a relay node for multi-hop routing

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: WiFi/LAN Auto-Discovery
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable local network discovery. Disable if another Reticulum app (e.g. Sideband) is running.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable TCP Bootstrap
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Connect to a remote Reticulum node via TCP

EditTextPreference.android:summary: Hostname or IP of the TCP bootstrap peer
TCP port of the bootstrap peer
